content.explanation:
**Body & Diseases Vocabulary — शरीर और बीमारियाँ:**

**Body Parts (शरीर के अंग):**
| External | Hindi | Internal | Hindi |
|---------|-------|---------|-------|
| Forehead | माथा | Lungs | फेफड़े |
| Eyebrow | भौंह | Heart | दिल |
| Earlobe | कान की लौ | Kidney | गुर्दा |
| Nostril | नथुना | Liver | जिगर |
| Chin | ठोड़ी | Spine | रीढ़ |
| Wrist | कलाई | Brain | मस्तिष्क |
| Ankle | टखना | Stomach | पेट |
| Elbow | कोहनी | Intestine | आँत |

**Common Diseases & Conditions:**
| Disease | Hindi |
|---------|-------|
| Fever | बुखार |
| Headache | सिरदर्द |
| Diabetes | मधुमेह |
| Asthma | दमा |
| Hypertension | उच्च रक्तचाप |
| Arthritis | गठिया |
| Pneumonia | निमोनिया |
| Anemia | रक्ताल्पता |
| Allergy | एलर्जी |
| Fracture | हड्डी टूटना |
rules: "I have a + disease/pain": "I have a headache." / "I have diabetes."
"My + body part + hurts/aches": "My back hurts." / "My throat aches."
"I am suffering from + disease": "She is suffering from diabetes."
"I have been having + symptom + for": "I have been having a cough for 3 days."
Doctor language: "I am experiencing pain in my..." / "I have pain in my..."
Medical terms end in -itis = inflammation: tonsillitis, appendicitis, arthritis
content.memoryTrick:
**Body + HAVE/HURT/SUFFER:**
• I HAVE a cold/fever/cough (condition)
• My [body part] HURTS/ACHES (pain)
• I am SUFFERING FROM diabetes/cancer (serious)
• I am FEELING feverish/nauseous (symptom feeling)

examples.hindi: मेरे सिर में बहुत दर्द है।
उसे बुखार है और गले में दर्द है।
examples.english: She has a fever and a sore throat.
She has a fracture in her wrist.

examples.hindi: डॉक्टर ने rest करने की सलाह दी।

examples.english: I have been having a cough for 3 days.

mistakes.why: 'Headache' is a countable noun — 'a headache' required

mistakes.correct: My body is aching. / I am in pain.
mistakes.why: 'Pain' is not used as a continuous verb; say 'ache/hurt' or 'be in pain'

mistakes.wrong: Doctor told me to take rest.
mistakes.correct: The doctor advised/told me to rest.
mistakes.why: 'Take rest' is Indian English; standard = 'rest' / 'get rest'

speakingTips: Doctor visit: 'Doctor, I have been having chest pain and shortness of breath for 2 days.'
Asking about health: 'How are you feeling? You look a little under the weather.'
Medical history: 'I have high blood pressure and I am allergic to penicillin.'

vocabulary.example: Fever is a symptom of many diseases.
The doctor gave a diagnosis of pneumonia.
Show this prescription at the pharmacy.
There is inflammation in his knee joint.
She is on the path to recovery.

practice.hindi: मेरे सिर में दर्द हो रहा है।

alternatives: i have a burning sensation in my eyes.

practice.english: She has a cough and cold.
alternatives: she is suffering from cold and cough.

practice.english: The doctor prescribed medicine to him.
alternatives: the doctor wrote a prescription for him.

practice.hindi: हृदय रोग एक गंभीर बीमारी है।
practice.english: Heart disease is a serious illness.
alternatives: cardiac disease is a severe condition.

practice.hint: finger = उँगली, hurt / injured = चोट लगना

practice.hindi: डॉक्टर ने कहा कि आराम करो।
practice.english: The doctor said to take rest.
alternatives: the doctor advised me to rest.
